  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.event
  2. BasicPropertyChangeSource

Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource

Packages that use BasicPropertyChangeSource
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi
The root package of the Anahata AI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.agi
Provides model-agnostic, intelligent configuration objects for agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.context
Manages the conversation history and the injection of just-in-time context.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
Provides classes related to web grounding and RAG.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.code
Provides specialized message parts for server-side code execution.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.web
Web-centric message extensions and grounding metadata.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider
Provides the core domain model for Anahata's context management system.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource
Provides the V2 Universal Resource Pipeline (URP) infrastructure.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.view
Managed viewports and stateful data interpretation for resources.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.status
Provides classes for managing and broadcasting agi status events.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool
Provides the core framework for defining, managing, and executing local Java tools.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
Defines the model-agnostic domain model for the tool (function) calling subsystem.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad
Provides the domain model for tools that were requested by the model but could not be found.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java
Provides the concrete domain model for tools implemented as Java methods via reflection.
uno.anahata.asi.anthropic
Provides the provider implementation for Anthropic's Claude API.
uno.anahata.asi.destkop.swing
Provides the core Swing UI components and container orchestration for the standalone Anahata ASI desktop application.
uno.anahata.asi.gemini
Provides the provider implementation for Google's Gemini API using the official GenAI Java SDK.
uno.anahata.asi.huggingface
Provides the provider implementation for the Hugging Face Inference API.
uno.anahata.asi.minimax
Provides the provider implementation for the MiniMax API using their Anthropic-compatible interface.
uno.anahata.asi.modal
Provides a pre-configured provider for Modal's GLM-5 inference endpoint.
uno.anahata.asi.nb
Core classes for the NetBeans integration of the Anahata ASI.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.ide.context
Provides specialized context providers for the NetBeans IDE windowing system.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.alerts
Provides real-time diagnostic and alerting capabilities for NetBeans projects within the ASI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.context
Provides a hierarchical context-injection layer for NetBeans projects.
uno.anahata.asi.openai
High-fidelity provider implementation for the OpenAI Responses API (/v1/responses).
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible
Provides a universal, OpenAI-compatible provider implementation for the Anahata ASI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.swing
Provides the foundational Swing UI components for managing and switching between multiple AI agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi
Provides the core UI orchestration components for individual AGI sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.internal
Internal Swing utilities and bridge components for Anahata ASI.

  • Uses of BasicPropertyChangeSource in uno.anahata.asi

    Subclasses of BasicPropertyChangeSource in uno.anahata.asi
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractAsiContainer
    A hybrid static/instance class for managing global and application-specific configurations.
    class 
    AsiContainerPreferences
    A unified, serializable POJO that acts as a container for all user-configured preferences.

    Subclasses of BasicPropertyChangeSource in uno.anahata.asi.agi
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Agi
    The central, provider-agnostic artificial super intelligence (ASI) orchestrator.
    class 
    AgiConfig
    The definitive configuration blueprint for an individual Agi session.

  • Uses of BasicPropertyChangeSource in uno.anahata.asi.agi.context

    Subclasses of BasicPropertyChangeSource in uno.anahata.asi.agi.context
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BasicContextProvider
    A basic, reusable implementation of the ContextProvider interface that provides the foundational logic for hierarchical context management.
    class 
    ContextManager
    The definitive manager for an Agi session's context in the V2 architecture.
    class 
    ContextWindowGarbageCollector
    Orchestrates the monitoring and logging of the Context Window Garbage Collection (CwGC).

  • Uses of BasicPropertyChangeSource in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message

    Subclasses of BasicPropertyChangeSource in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractMessage
    The abstract base class for all messages in a conversation, providing common metadata and functionality for the rich, hierarchical V2 domain model.
    class 
    AbstractModelMessage<R extends Response>
    Represents a message originating from the AI model.
    class 
    AbstractPart
    The foundational component of an AbstractMessage, representing a discrete block of multimodal content.
    class 
    AgiUserMessage
    A specialized UserMessage representing intent originated by another AGI session within the same ASI container.
    class 
    BlobPart
    An abstract base class for binary data parts, such as an image or a document.
    class 
    InputUserMessage
    A specialized UserMessage designed for direct manipulation by UI components like an input panel.
    class 
    ModelBlobPart
    A specialized BlobPart for binary content generated by the model, including internal thought process details.
    class 
    ModelTextPart
    A specialized TextPart for content generated by an AI model.
    class 
    RagMessage
    A specialized UserMessage that represents just-in-time, ephemeral context provided by the environment (Retrieval-Augmented Generation).
    class 
    TextPart
    An abstract base class for text-based message parts.
    class 
    UserBlobPart
    A concrete BlobPart implementation for binary content provided by the user.
    class 
    UserMessage
    Represents a conversation message originating from the end-user.
    class 
    UserTextPart
    A concrete TextPart implementation for text content provided by the user.

  • Uses of BasicPropertyChangeSource in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.code

    Subclasses of BasicPropertyChangeSource in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.code
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HostedCodeExecutionCallPart
    A specialized part representing a request from the model to execute code on the server (e.g., Python in OpenAI's Code Interpreter or Gemini's Code Execution).
    class 
    HostedCodeExecutionResultPart
    A specialized part representing the output or logs from a server-side code execution.

    WebSearchCallPart
    A specialized part representing a search query or search intent generated by the model.

    AbstractAiProvider
    The abstract base class for all AI model providers, now with model caching.

    RequestConfig
    The definitive, model-agnostic configuration object for a single API request.

  • Uses of BasicPropertyChangeSource in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi

    Subclasses of BasicPropertyChangeSource in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractTool<P extends AbstractToolParameter, C extends AbstractToolCall>
    The abstract base class for a tool, now generic on its Parameter and Call types.
    class 
    AbstractToolCall<T extends AbstractTool<?,?>, R extends AbstractToolResponse<?>>
    Represents a request to execute a specific tool.
    class 
    AbstractToolResponse<C extends AbstractToolCall<?,?>>
    Represents the response of a tool call, designed for deferred execution.

  • Uses of BasicPropertyChangeSource in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad

    Subclasses of BasicPropertyChangeSource in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BadTool
    A special tool implementation representing a tool that was requested by the model but was not found in the registered toolkits.
    class 
    BadToolCall
    Represents a call to a BadTool, capturing an invalid tool request from the model.
    class 
    BadToolResponse
    The response for a BadToolCall.

  • Uses of BasicPropertyChangeSource in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java

    Subclasses of BasicPropertyChangeSource in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JavaMethodTool
    A model-agnostic, stateful representation of a single Java method tool.
    class 
    JavaMethodToolCall
    A model-agnostic representation of a request to execute a specific Java method tool.
    class 
    JavaMethodToolResponse
    A rich POJO that captures the complete and final outcome of a single tool call.

    Provides a real-time view of a project's file and folder structure.

    Provides a unified, architecturally-aware view of a project's structure.
